title: You're Paying $558K Interest on a $400K House
hook: Nobody tells you the actual price tag on a 30-year mortgage — and when you see the real number, it changes everything.
angle: The full interest cost of a standard 30-year mortgage exceeds the home's purchase price — banks don't advertise this and most buyers never calculate it
audience: First-time homebuyers, current homeowners, anyone considering a mortgage in the next 5 years
key_numbers: $558,000 in interest on a $400K home at 7%
$958,000 total paid over 30 years — 2.4x the purchase price
First decade: 80%+ of every payment goes to interest, not equity
One extra payment per year saves $85,000 and 4 years
